leadText: Stunfisk (Japanese: マッギョ Maggyo) is a dual-type Ground/Electric Pokémon introduced in Generation V. In Galar, Stunfisk has a dual-type Ground/Steel regional form. Neither Unovan Stunfisk nor Galarian Stunfisk are known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon.

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] Stunfisk is a flat, fishlike Pokémon with a broad, mud-brown body. At the base of its yellow tail is a yellow marking shaped like an exclamation mark when seen from behind. These markings can generate electricity. It has small, horizontal, oval-shaped eyes, white with a tiny black pupil and no irises. Almost exactly between these two eyes lies the two thick gray lips that form its mouth. It has two small, flimsy fins at the sides of its body; each with two lobes. It has been seen to leap into the air and flap its fins as if they're wings to remain airborne. Stunfisk lives in mudflats and coastal areas, and thanks to the bacteria which lived alongside it, it developed the organs which it uses to generate electricity. Stunfisk's very tough skin keeps it unharmed if stepped on, even by sumo wrestlers. To exploit this, it buries itself in the mud of the seashore and waits for prey to pass by. Whenever unsuspecting prey touches its body, it is zapped. Stunfisk smiles when electrocuting its foes for a reason that is still not yet known. If it cannot paralyze its foe, it contorts itself with unexpected speed and flops away. Stunfisk smiling Stunfisk flying Forms [ edit | edit source ] Galarian Stunfisk resembling a bear trap In Galar , Stunfisk has a regional form : Galarian Stunfisk. Galarian Stunfisk is grayish-brown, with three green markings similar to footprints or leaves on its body. It cannot generate electricity, but the high iron content of the mud it lives in has strengthened its fins, which have been adapted into an apparatus akin to a bear trap. It leaves its red and white mouth along with visible sharp teeth, which looks similar to a Poké Ball , visible to lure in prey and then slams its fins shut on them so they cannot escape. Galarian Stunfisk is the only known Pokémon capable of learning the move Snap Trap . It is also the only known Pokémon that can have Mimicry as an Ability .

Sword Thanks to bacteria that lived in the mud flats with it, this Pokémon developed the organs it uses to generate electricity. Shield For some reason, this Pokémon smiles slightly when it emits a strong electric current from the yellow markings on its body. Galarian Stunfisk Sword Living in mud with a high iron content has given it a strong steel body. Shield Its conspicuous lips lure prey in as it lies in wait in the mud. When prey gets close, Stunfisk clamps its jagged steel fins down on them. Galarian Form Legends: Z-A Living in mud with a high iron content has given it a strong steel body. Spin-off games Pokopia #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Pokopia . sections.title: Pokédex entries
sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry BW032 Stunfisk Ash's Pokédex Stunfisk, the Trap Pokémon. Stunfisk hides itself in the mud and then delivers an electric jolt when its prey touches it, smiling all the while. Episode Pokémon Source Entry JN073 Stunfisk Goh's Rotom Phone Stunfisk, Galarian form . The Trap Pokémon. A Ground and Steel type. Stunfisk lies in the mud while luring opponents in with its brightly colored lips, then it attacks with its two serrated steel fins. Episode Pokémon Source Entry HZ097 Stunfisk Dot's Rotom Phone Stunfisk, the Trap Pokémon. A Ground and Electric type. It conceals itself in the mud of the seashore, then it waits. When touched, it delivers a jolt of electricity.
